JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-27-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COSTELLO, MATTHEW
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF. PLTF'S. EXHIBITS, I.D AND EVID. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY TESTIMONY RECEIVED BY THE COURT. THE COURT AFTER ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT MATTHEW COSTELLO FOR RESTITUTION AND FOR PAST DUE RENT OF $2,096.50 AND $140.00 COST AND NO ATTORNEY FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTELLO, MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 727 A 11TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,096.50 RENT, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,236.50
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
